blocks.text: Åberg leads The Players — Hovland six back with Sunday still to play
⚽ 21:00 — Real Madrid vs Elche, La Liga — Madrid looking to keep title pressure on
Bodø/Glimt travel to Lisbon on Tuesday holding a 3-0 aggregate lead over Sporting CP. A quarter-final berth would be the greatest European result in the club's history.
